title: ceratostylis brevicostata
intro: Ceratostylis brevicostata, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis brevicostata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Ceratostylis brevicostata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can be found in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
